name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA)
description: Common Paper's standard Mutual NDA for protecting confidential information exchanged between two parties negotiating or engaged in a business relationship.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover Page used to execute the Mutual NDA. Deal-specific terms are entered here and it incorporates the MNDA Standard Terms by reference to form the complete executed agreement.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Common Paper's standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering subscriptions, fees, data protection, warranties, and liability.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard agreement for early-stage companies to collaborate with design partners who test a product in development and provide feedback, typically at no cost.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Common Paper's standard SLA defining uptime commitments and service credits, designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA).

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: Common Paper's standard agreement governing the delivery of professional or consulting services, including statements of work, deliverables, and payment terms.

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: Common Paper's standard agreement governing the processing of personal data between a data controller and processor, addressing privacy and data protection compliance.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard agreement for licensing on-premise or self-hosted software, as opposed to cloud-delivered software covered by the CSA.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard agreement governing business partnerships between two companies, such as referral, reseller, or joint go-to-market arrangements.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper's standard short-term trial or evaluation agreement that allows a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a longer-term deal.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: Common Paper's standard HIPAA-required agreement governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) between a covered entity and a business associate.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper's standard supplemental terms addressing the use of artificial intelligence and machine learning within a primary commercial agreement.
